files.Title: BLL.BalanceService
files.Summary: Manages client account balances: periodic membership billing, balance enquiry, debt validation, and movement history.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.AgendaDTO
files.Summary: Represents a single availability window for a facility space on a given day of the week.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.ClienteDTO
files.Summary: Projection of a Cliente entity used across all BLL service boundaries.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.ClienteStatus
files.Summary: Indicates whether a client account is active or has been deactivated.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.ComprobanteDTO
files.Summary: Transfer object representing a receipt (comprobante) file attached to a payment or reservation.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.EjercicioDTO
files.Summary: Represents a single exercise entry within a .

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.EspacioDTO
files.Summary: Projection of a Espacio (sporting space/facility) entity exposed through BLL service boundaries.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.EstadoBalance
files.Summary: Categorized account balance state derived from the numeric balance value.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.GenerarReservaDTO
files.Summary: Command object carrying all inputs required to create a new reservation via ReservaService.GenerarReserva.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.IngresoDTO
files.Summary: Projection of a facility check-in (Ingreso) record with a hydrated client name.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.MembresiaDTO
files.Summary: Projection of a Membresia entity exposed through BLL service boundaries.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.PagoDTO
files.Summary: Projection of a Pago entity used as both input and output for payment operations.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.ReservaDTO
files.Summary: Projection of a Reserva entity with denormalized client and space names.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.ResultadoIngresoDTO
files.Summary: Result returned by ClienteService.ValidarIngreso describing whether a client is permitted to enter the facility and the reason when access is denied.

files.Title: BLL.DTOs.RutinaDTO
files.Summary: Projection of a Rutina (training routine) entity with its associated exercises.

files.Title: BLL.Mappers.AgendaMapper
files.Summary: Bidirectional mapper between domain entities and projections.

files.Summary: Bidirectional mapper between domain entities and projections.

files.Title: BLL.Mappers.EjercicioMapper
files.Summary: Bidirectional mapper between exercise domain entities and projections.

files.Summary: Bidirectional mapper between domain entities and projections.

files.Title: BLL.Mappers.MembresiaMapper
files.Summary: Bidirectional mapper between domain entities and projections.

files.Title: BLL.Mappers.PagoMapper
files.Summary: Bidirectional mapper between payment and receipt domain entities and their DTO projections.

files.Title: BLL.Mappers.ReservaMapper
files.Summary: Bidirectional mapper between domain entities and projections.

files.Title: BLL.Mappers.RutinaMapper
files.Summary: Bidirectional mapper between domain entities and projections.

files.Title: BLL.SchedulerService
files.Summary: Singleton background scheduler that periodically triggers .

files.Title: BLL.Services.AgendaService
files.Summary: Business logic service for configuring and querying a sports space's weekly operating schedule (agenda).

files.Title: BLL.Services.ClienteService
files.Summary: Business logic service for client lifecycle management.

files.Title: BLL.Services.EjercicioService
files.Summary: Business logic service for managing the exercise catalog.

files.Title: BLL.Services.EspacioService
files.Summary: Business logic service for sports space (espacio) management.

files.Title: BLL.Services.IngresoService
files.Summary: Read-only service for querying facility check-in (ingreso) history.

files.Title: BLL.Services.MembresiaService
files.Summary: Business logic service for membership plan management.

files.Title: BLL.Services.PagoService
files.Summary: Business logic service for payment registration, refunds, and receipt management.

files.Title: BLL.Services.ReservaService
files.Summary: Business logic service for reservation management.

files.Title: BLL.Services.RutinaService
files.Summary: Business logic service for workout routine lifecycle management.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IAgendaRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for records that define the weekly operating schedule of a sports space.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IClienteRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for entities, extending standard CRUD with client-specific lookup and membership operations.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IEspacioRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for (sports space) entities, extending standard CRUD with availability-filtered listing.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IMembresiaRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for (membership plan) entities, extending standard CRUD with plan-specific lookups.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IMovimientoRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for ledger (movement) records.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IPagoRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for entities, extending standard CRUD with payment-specific query operations.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IReservaRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for entities, extending standard CRUD with reservation-specific query and availability check operations.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IRutinaRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for entities, extending standard CRUD with routine lifecycle operations.

files.Title: DAL.Contracts.IUnitOfWork
files.Summary: Defines a transactional scope that shares a single database connection across multiple repositories.

files.Title: DAL.Factory.DalFactory
files.Summary: Static service locator / factory for all repository singletons.

files.Title: DAL.Impl.BaseBusinessSqlRepository
files.Summary: Base class for all business-domain SQL repositories. Extends with support for shared and injection by .

files.Title: DAL.Impl.SqlServer.UnitOfWork
files.Summary: Implements the Unit of Work pattern for SQL Server. Manages a single and shared across all enrolled repositories for the duration of one logical operation.

files.Title: Domain.Composite.Acceso
files.Summary: Abstract base component of the Composite design pattern used to model the permission tree.

files.Title: Domain.Composite.Familia
files.Summary: Composite (interior) node in the permission tree that groups zero or more children, which may themselves be instances or leaves.

files.Title: Domain.Composite.Patente
files.Summary: Leaf node in the permission tree representing a single, atomic permission.

files.Title: Domain.Composite.PermisoKeys
files.Summary: Defines the canonical string keys for every permission in the system.

files.Title: Domain.Usuario
files.Summary: Domain entity representing an application user.

files.Title: Service.Contracts.IBackup
files.Summary: Contract for database backup and restore operations.

files.Title: Service.Contracts.IGenericRepository<T>
files.Summary: Generic repository contract defining standard CRUD operations for any entity type.

files.Title: Service.Contracts.IUsuarioRepository
files.Summary: Repository contract for entities, extending standard CRUD with user-specific permission and lookup operations.

files.Title: Service.DTO.UsuarioDTO
files.Summary: Data Transfer Object representing an authenticated or listed application user.

files.Title: Service.Facade.Extension.TranslationsExtension
files.Summary: Extension methods that provide i18n translation for enum values.

files.Title: Service.Helpers.ConnectionManager
files.Summary: Provides strongly-typed access to named connection strings defined in App.config.

files.Title: Service.Helpers.CryptographyHelper
files.Summary: Provides cryptographic utilities used for password storage and integrity verification.

files.Title: Service.Helpers.PermisoHelper
files.Summary: Extension methods for permission checks on .

files.Title: Service.Impl.BaseRepository
files.Summary: Abstract base class for all SQL Server repositories, providing low-level ADO.NET helpers.

files.Title: Service.Impl.ConsoleRepository
files.Summary: Clase ConsoleLogger: Implementación de un logger que no realiza ninguna acción. Se utiliza como logger por defecto para evitar errores si no se proporciona un logger real. Esta clase es útil cuando no se desea realizar registros de logs en ciertos entornos o configuraciones.

files.Title: Service.Impl.LogRepository
files.Summary: Clase PersistentLogger para manejar el registro de información y errores en una base de datos. Esta clase permite registrar logs de nivel informativo y de errores en la base de datos, y proporciona un método de respaldo en caso de que la base de datos no esté disponible.

files.Title: Service.Logic.BitacoraService
files.Summary: Application-wide audit log service. All BLL operations that have user-visible side effects call this service to record INFO, WARNING, or ERROR entries.

files.Title: Service.Logic.PermisosService
files.Summary: Manages the permission tree: creation and modification of groups, and provisioning of leaf nodes from .

files.Title: Service.Logic.UsuarioService
files.Summary: Manages user authentication, registration, profile updates, and password management.
